description_long: This chair features a cylindrical base resembling a repurposed industrial oil drum, finished in a weathered reddish-brown metal with horizontal ridges. The seat is round and padded, upholstered in a dark, slightly wrinkled leather or faux leather material. The backrest is high and curves around in a semi-circular fashion, also padded and upholstered with a diamond-tufted pattern for added comfort and style. The upper rim and side supports are constructed from a matte black material, likely metal or painted wood, providing structural integrity and a modern contrast. The overall design blends rugged, industrial aesthetics with urban comfort, making it suitable for trendy public spaces or creative outdoor settings. The chair appears robust and heavy, with no visible legs, as the cylindrical base sits directly on the ground.
description: A round, industrial-style chair with a weathered metal drum base and a padded, tufted leather backrest and seat. The design combines rugged materials with urban comfort and a modern touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded, diamond-tufted backrest and round seat, framed by black side supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical metal base and the thickness of the seat cushion, with the backrest curving around.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full cylindrical metal drum with horizontal ridges and no visible seat or backrest details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same cylindrical base and the curve of the backrest, mirroring view 1.
